evaluation.comments: Boundary review only: one admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro call was made with thinking enabled per the Goal 14A admission update, stream=false, no tools, no model substitution, no retry, and the approved source hash. The provider counted reasoning tokens against the 4000-token cap and returned empty content; per the locked run scope no retry was made because the call produced output. Spend stayed far below the $3 cap. Raw source text, provider payloads, prompt traces, model traces, reasoning traces, and secrets are not committed. The empty-content outcome is recorded honestly as a bounded negative; method quality was not evaluated by this boundary record.
